summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and its delegate script as an end-to-end readonly smoke pair. Both artifacts are complete, well-structured, and aligned with the best-effort, evidence-backed contract. No critical issues found; the wrapper correctly delegates and validates, and the delegate handles extraction with OCR fallback and clear reporting. Verdict is pass.
notes: Static artifact analysis used per runtime evidence policy; live execution not required.
Both wrapper and delegate snapshots reviewed together as per constraints.
All review contract requirements met, including verdict in metadata.

metadata.verdict_rationale: Artifacts demonstrate a complete, functional design for readonly PDF-to-Excel smoke with proper error handling, evidence gates, and alignment with best-effort contract. No missing content or critical flaws.
